PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-18-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lauren Corman appeared by telephone for Kathleen Stevens (Petitioner).

The Court questions how the will was discovered and when. Ms. Corman stated that she believes the will was discovered in the Decedent's paper work, that she is not sure why the will wasn't discovered earlier, that there was a lot of paper work to go through and that it wasn't discovered at the time when the probate estate was set up. The Court removes Ms. Stevens as the administrator and revokes the letters that were issued on May 16, 2019. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administrator with Will Annexed (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. Ms. Corman is to provide a separate form of order that removes Ms. Stevens and revokes the letters. Status on close of estate is set for July 12, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
